title: InstCombine: Add minnum/maxnum SimplifyDemandedFPClass baseline tests
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-fpclass-maxnum.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-fpclass-maxnum.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..62fb47646365f

declare nofpclass(nan ninf nsub nnorm) float @returns_positive_or_zero()

declare nofpclass(nan pinf psub pnorm) float @returns_negative_or_zero()

; CHECK-NEXT:    ret float [[RESULT]]
